name: Team RWBY: Support
description:
(REQUEST!) You were a good friend at Beacon's, before you were captured and tortured by the Fang, hoping to unlock the secrets of your powerful Semblance. Well, let's just say, months of prodding has led to their utter annihilation, and now you're restrained, Team RWBY is resolved to find a way to help their friend.

https://safebooru.org/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=3046407
creator: Jack4884
